sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Can Firefly Aerospace’s (FLY) Alpha Block II Success Reframe Its Reliability And Avionics Narrative?
feed.summary: Firefly Aerospace's Alpha Flight 7 mission successfully launched, achieving orbital insertion and validating Block II upgrades like in-house avionics and enhanced thermal protection. This success is a critical proof point for improving reliability after a previous failure and impacts its investment narrative, especially with upcoming Q4 2025 earnings. Investors are watching if the company's revenue guidance and credit facility are sufficient to support ongoing losses and upgrades as they push for a higher launch cadence.

feed.title: When Things Go Wrong With A Commerce Task, Many Consumers Will Blame The Answer Engine
feed.summary: A Forrester survey across US, UK, and Canada indicates that over two out of five consumers would blame the answer engine itself if issues arise during commerce-related tasks, even over the brand or their own prompts. This suggests that as agentic commerce evolves, platforms offering native checkout experiences must address fundamental commerce requirements like inventory, delivery, and post-purchase support. Otherwise, answer engines will continue to face consumer expectations of responsibility for the full customer experience.

feed.title: 3M and Bain will buy fire and rescue firm for nearly $2B in joint venture
feed.summary: 3M and Bain Capital are forming a joint venture to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue for $1.95 billion, with 3M's Scott Safety unit becoming part of the new entity. 3M will own 50.1% of the venture and will receive $700 million at closing. This deal broadens 3M's safety portfolio and comes after 3M's earlier acquisition of Scott Safety in 2017 and its recent efforts to spin off its healthcare business and address PFAS litigation.

feed.title: Coca-Cola HBC grants performance share awards to senior executives
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC has awarded nil-cost performance share awards to its senior executives, including the CEO, CFO, and COO, under its Stock Option and Performance Share Award Plan. These awards, based on a reference price of £44.62 per share, will vest over a three-year performance period, with some requiring an additional two-year holding period. This move aims to align management incentives with long-term shareholder value and retain key leaders through equity-based compensation.

feed.title: Keysight and AttoTude Collaborate on Advanced Signal Analysis Solutions for THz Interconnect Development
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and AttoTude Inc. are collaborating to advance THz interconnect development for AI data centers. AttoTude is utilizing enhancements to Keysight’s 89600 Vector Signal Analysis software and UXR Oscilloscope to accelerate the characterization of its THz radio technology, which operates at frequencies up to 1 THz with high data rates. This partnership enables more efficient and reliable validation of AttoTude's innovative solutions designed to meet the growing demands of AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Exxon says FPSO for fifth Guyana offshore oil and gas project 'almost complete' (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's head in Guyana, Alistair Routledge, announced that the Errea Wittu floating production facility for the consortium's fifth offshore oil and gas project in Guyana is "almost complete." The facility is expected to depart from Singapore soon. This development signals continued progress in Exxon's significant investments in the region.

feed.title: Citi Gave £100 Million Credit Line to Lender Backed by MFS’ Raja
feed.summary: Citigroup extended a £100 million credit line to Interbridge Mortgages, a UK lender backed by Paresh Raja, whose other company, Market Financial Solutions Ltd., was facing collapse. The funding agreement was made in January to support Interbridge's expansion.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Acquires Charging Inlet Assets From Phoenix Contact
feed.summary: TE Connectivity has acquired the EV charging inlet manufacturing segment of Phoenix Contact E-Mobility GmbH. This acquisition allows TE Connectivity to expand its role in the electric vehicle market, particularly in vehicle-side charging inlet components, as Phoenix Contact exits the automotive sector. The deal is expected to enhance TE Connectivity's product portfolio, support its growth objectives in e-mobility, and contribute to revenue by fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Aflac (NYSE:AFL) Major Shareholder Sells $1,723,389.00 in Stock
feed.summary: A major shareholder of Aflac (NYSE:AFL), Post Holdings Co. Ltd. Japan, sold 15,700 shares on March 17th for $1,723,389, reducing its ownership by 0.03%. This sale is part of a larger trend of the shareholder selling approximately 143,800 shares totaling $15.8 million between March 5th and March 17th, although they still retain over 52 million shares valued at $5.72 billion. Aflac recently missed quarterly earnings expectations with $1.57 EPS and $4.28 billion in revenue, leading to an average analyst "Hold" rating and a target price of $111.73.

feed.title: Kroger Nationwide Recall Update: Customers Issued Warnings Over Products
feed.summary: Kroger has issued several recalls in 2026 for both food and non-food items due to risks such as undeclared allergens, potential Salmonella contamination, and foreign material. The recalls include specific Red Bird Farms products for undeclared sesame, Navitas Organics products for Salmonella, and Ajinomoto Foods items for glass contamination. Customers are advised to not use or consume recalled products and return them for a refund.

feed.title: T-Mobile and Mint Mobile tops in J.D. Power experience study
feed.summary: A new J.D. Power study reveals that customers prefer mobile apps over websites for telecom interactions due to easier logins, largely thanks to biometric authentication. T-Mobile led in overall customer satisfaction among internet service providers, while Mint Mobile ranked highest among mobile providers. The study highlights the need for telecom companies to improve website functionality and maintain consistent digital experiences across all channels.

feed.title: Stryker cyberattack delays surgeries for some patients
feed.summary: A cyberattack on Stryker, a medical device company, has reportedly caused delays for some patients awaiting surgeries. The article, by Ike Swetlitz and Miquéla V Thornton, highlights the impact of the attack on healthcare operations. This incident underscores the growing concern about cybersecurity in the medical device sector.

feed.title: British Columbia Debt Downgraded Again on ‘Entrenched’ Deficit
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has downgraded British Columbia's debt again, citing an "entrenched" deficit and worsening fiscal position for Canada's third-most populous province. This marks the latest in a series of downgrades, with the bond ratings agency lowering its long-term issuer and senior unsecured debt rating to Aa2 from Aa1. Moody's highlighted a deterioration in long-term fiscal management as the primary reason for the downgrade.

feed.title: FingerMotion: Share Exchange Deal To Acquire Telecom Provider Telforge
feed.summary: FingerMotion, a mobile services and technology company, announced a share exchange agreement to acquire Telforge, Inc., a cloud voice and messaging solutions provider. The deal involves issuing up to 7.33 million shares of FingerMotion common stock to Telforge shareholders, with a portion contingent on performance-based earnout milestones. This acquisition aims to expand FingerMotion's geographical reach, enhance its service portfolio, and manage high volumes of telecommunications traffic without significant additional capital investment.

feed.title: CIBC raises its price target on Endeavour Silver Corp. (EXK) to C$25 and keeps an outperformer rating
feed.summary: CIBC has increased its price target for Endeavour Silver Corp. (EXK) to C$25, maintaining an "outperformer" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects CIBC's positive outlook on the company's financial prospects and market position.

feed.title: iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Asia ETF (NASDAQ: EEMA) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides detailed share price information for iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Asia ETF (NASDAQ: EEMA), including its current price of $98.41 and recent performance data. It outlines price movements over the current year, last year, and financial years, alongside a historical daily share price table. The data highlights EEMA's stock performance and volume over various periods.

feed.title: Biogen Targets Pediatric MS Growth With New Phase 3 Fumarate Study
feed.summary: Biogen (BIIB) has initiated a new Phase 3 clinical trial to evaluate the safety and efficacy of diroximel fumarate and dimethyl fumarate for treating relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis in pediatric patients. This study aims to provide a child-friendly oral treatment option and reinforce Biogen's long-term presence in the MS market, particularly as older products face generic competition. The trial, while not expected to impact short-term revenue, is a strategic move to potentially expand label indications and support the company's MS portfolio against rivals like Novartis's Gilenya.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts JM Smucker (SJM) Price Target to $113, Maintains Hold Rating | SJM Stock News
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Robert Moskow has lowered the price target for JM Smucker (SJM) from $124 to $113 but maintained a 'Hold' rating. This adjustment reflects the analyst's re-evaluation of the company's valuation and market conditions. Despite this, other analysts have recently upgraded or raised price targets for SJM, and the average one-year price target from 15 analysts suggests a 24.04% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean to add private South Pacific island to Australia cruises
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group is adding its first exclusive Southern Hemisphere destination, Royal Beach Club Lelepa in Vanuatu, to Australia cruises starting October 2027. This new private island will feature two beaches, ten bars, various water activities, and a nature trail, with all-inclusive menus. It will be part of itineraries sailing from Brisbane and Sydney on the Voyager of the Seas and Anthem of the Seas, respectively.

feed.title: Chubb defeats $10 million property claim as court finds deliberate arson
feed.summary: Chubb successfully defended a $10 million property claim after a Queensland court concluded that a luxury estate fire was deliberately set, despite forensic evidence being inconclusive. The court based its decision on the property owner's dire financial situation, inconsistent accounts of the incident, and attempts to obstruct the investigation. The owner, Preston Richardson, who took his own life before the trial, was found to have intentionally caused the fire through circumstantial evidence.

feed.title: Mining shares led by Newmont plunge alongside precious metals as rate cut hopes fade (NEM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Mining company shares, including Newmont, are experiencing a significant decline, paralleling a plunge in precious metals. This downturn is attributed to rising inflation expectations and diminishing hopes for global interest rate cuts. Gold and silver themselves fell by 6% and 9% respectively, leading to investor fears.

feed.title: Oversold Tech Stocks: Oracle & Sea Limited Analysis for 2026 Investors - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The current market sell-off, driven by high capital expenditure and uncertainty in the tech sector, has led many previously high-performing technology stocks to trade at significant discounts, potentially presenting opportunities for investors. Oracle and Sea Limited are highlighted as two potentially oversold companies. Oracle faces skepticism regarding a 2025 partnership, substantial debt, and high AI infrastructure spending, while Sea Limited is experiencing margin pressures and a significant expansion in its loan volume.

feed.title: HSIC (NASDAQ) Form 144: insiders list 144, 191, 1,020 shares tied to vesting
feed.summary: Henry Schein Inc. (HSIC) has filed a Form 144 indicating proposed sales of common stock related to restricted stock vesting. The filing details planned disposals of 144 shares vesting on March 3, 2025, 191 shares on March 1, 2026, and 1,020 shares on March 16, 2026. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is identified as the broker for these procedural notices, which do not confirm actual sales but notify of intent under Rule 144.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation stock hits 52-week low at $180.33
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation's stock recently hit a new 52-week low of $180.39, marking a significant decline over the past year with a -4.75% total return, despite the company maintaining strong gross profit margins of 50.25%. This drop suggests investor caution or market pressures, though the company has a 34-year history of dividend payments and recently announced the acquisition of UniFirst Corporation for $5.5 billion. Analysts have reiterated varying ratings, with UBS and Truist Securities maintaining 'Buy' ratings, while Stifel holds a 'Hold' rating.

feed.title: North Carolina nonprofits can seek $25,000 to prepare for storms
feed.summary: Duke Energy and its Foundation are providing $500,000 in grants to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina, with individual grants of up to $25,000 available to eligible nonprofit and government organizations. This funding aims to support training, emergency planning, local response collaboration, and public education initiatives. Since 2016, the Foundation has invested $11.4 million in the state's preparedness and recovery efforts, demonstrating an ongoing commitment to community safety and resilience in the face of increasingly severe weather.

feed.title: Duke Energy invests $500,000 to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $500,000 in grants to support storm preparedness and emergency readiness initiatives across North Carolina. The funding aims to help communities facing increasingly frequent and severe storms by bolstering natural disaster readiness through training, planning, collaboration, and public education. Eligible organizations can apply for grants up to $25,000 to enhance local response capabilities and community resilience.

feed.title: Move Over Meta, Microsoft — Constellation, NextEra Hit Big Tech Valuations In 2026's Weirdest Trade
feed.summary: In a surprising market shift in 2026, utility companies Constellation Energy and NextEra Energy are achieving valuations comparable to major tech firms like Meta and Microsoft. This unusual rerating is largely driven by the explosive energy demand from AI data centers, positioning these electricity providers, especially those in clean energy, as new growth stocks. Meanwhile, traditional tech giants are undergoing a valuation recalibration due to high AI capital expenditures and slowing software growth.

feed.title: Arista (ANET) shares higher after Jim Cramer said it made sense in January 2025
feed.summary: Shares of Arista Networks (ANET) rose after Jim Cramer's comments regarding the stock in January 2025. This indicates a positive market reaction to his past endorsement of the company.

feed.title: National Legal and Policy Center Submits Shareholder Proposal to Dominion Energy
feed.summary: The National Legal and Policy Center has submitted a shareholder proposal to Dominion Energy, Inc. The proposal requests that Dominion Energy require two separate individuals to hold the offices of Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer. This proposal is for the annual shareholder meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026.

feed.title: FormFactor Inc (FORM) Shares Down 3.77% on Mar 19
feed.summary: FormFactor Inc (FORM) shares dropped 3.77% on March 19, trading at $92.54 after reaching an intraday low of $89.00. While Wall Street analysts have an average target price of $84.11, suggesting a 9.10% downside, GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $50.38, indicating a more significant downside of 45.56%. The stock is currently 13.55% below its 52-week high but 309.82% above its 52-week low.

feed.title: TER vs. MKSI: Which Semiconductor Stock Is a Better Buy Now?
feed.summary: The article compares Teradyne (TER) and MKS Instruments (MKSI), two major players in the semiconductor market, to determine which offers greater upside potential amidst booming industry growth. Teradyne is favored due to its strong semiconductor test division benefiting from AI infrastructure demand and a high average earnings surprise. While MKSI also shows growth in semiconductor revenues, it faces challenges from seasonal slowdowns and softness in its industrial segment, leading to Teradyne being rated a "Strong Buy" by Zacks.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Wills Phillip R. III Sells 11,462 Shares of FVCBan
feed.summary: Phillip R. Wills III, a Director at FVCBankcorp Inc (FVCB), sold 11,462 shares of the company on March 17, 2026. This transaction brings his total ownership to 53,694 shares. The stock is currently trading at $14.81 and is considered "fairly valued" with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.01.

feed.title: Corning Taps Meta AI Deal And Foldable Glass For Future Growth
feed.summary: Corning has secured a multiyear, $6 billion partnership with Meta Platforms to supply optical fiber and multicore solutions for AI data centers and introduced Gorilla Glass Ceramic 3 for foldable devices, with Motorola as an early adopter. These moves significantly broaden Corning's growth avenues into both AI infrastructure and consumer electronics. The company's stock has seen substantial gains, reflecting market excitement over these new product and customer developments.

feed.title: NRG Energy Tests AI PowerOS To Refine Portfolio And Earnings Story
feed.summary: NRG Energy has partnered with Equilibrium Energy to implement the AI-native PowerOS platform for optimizing its portfolio. This move aims to integrate advanced AI tools into NRG's operational decision-making, especially concerning its gas-heavy fleet and virtual power plant capacity. While this could enhance efficiency and potentially support earnings growth, it also introduces execution risks related to the integration of complex AI systems, especially given NRG's current financial metrics like interest coverage and profit margins.

feed.title: Apple fends off bid for new Apple Watch import ban at US trade tribunal
feed.summary: A U.S. trade tribunal has preliminarily ruled that current Apple Watches do not infringe patents owned by Masimo, rejecting Masimo's attempt to renew an import ban. Apple had previously altered its watches to circumvent a 2023 import ban, and a judge agreed that these redesigned watches do not violate Masimo's blood-oxygen reading technology patents. Although a separate appeals court affirmed the 2023 ban, Apple has resumed importing its redesigned watches and faces ongoing patent disputes with Masimo.

feed.title: Arvinas (ARVN): Citigroup Raises Price Target to $21.00 and Main
feed.summary: Citigroup analyst Yigal Nochomovitz has maintained a Buy rating on Arvinas (ARVN) and increased the price target from $18.00 to $21.00, reflecting a 16.67% upward revision. This latest change follows several other analyst rating adjustments for Arvinas in recent months. The average one-year price target from 17 analysts for ARVN is $15.24, implying a 41.07% upside from its current price of $10.80, with a consensus brokerage recommendation of "Outperform."

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers Price Target for H.B. Fuller (FUL) to $67, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has reduced its price target for H.B. Fuller (FUL) to $67 from $76, while upholding its "Buy" rating for the stock. This adjustment represents an 11.84% decrease from the previous price target, though it still implies confidence in the company's future. The average target price from 6 analysts is $72.50, suggesting a 46.49% upside from the current price, with H.B. Fuller also earning an "Outperform" consensus recommendation from 7 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Here’s How Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE)’s Shares Behaved After Jim Cramer Said “They’re A Big Winner” In January 2025
feed.summary: This article examines the stock performance of Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) since Jim Cramer endorsed it as a "big winner" in January 2025. HPE, a computer equipment company focusing on data centers, has seen its shares rise 36% over the past year and 3% since Cramer's comments. The article also notes a period of volatility in late 2025, where the stock initially dipped due to AI stock caution but then surged following its fourth-quarter earnings.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal Issues HKD 1.17bn Senior Notes Under Global Programme
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) has issued HKD 1.17 billion in 2.82 percent senior notes due March 2027, under its existing US$40 billion note issuance program. This issuance, designated as Series 466, aims to enhance the bank's Hong Kong dollar funding and support its broader financing activities through international capital markets. The use of existing documentation allows the bank to efficiently manage its funding strategy and offer structured opportunities for fixed-income investors.

feed.title: Did Prologis’ (PLD) US$1.6 Billion GIC Venture Just Redefine Its Build-to-Suit Strategy?
feed.summary: Prologis and GIC have formed a US$1.6 billion joint venture to develop and own build-to-suit logistics facilities across major U.S. markets. This partnership strengthens Prologis's focus on customized warehouses but comes amidst an overhang from a significant legal case with potential damages exceeding US$1 billion. The article suggests this venture reinforces Prologis’s long-term strategy for modern logistics spaces, though investors should monitor both growth initiatives and legal risks.

feed.title: SAP Recognized as a Six-Time Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Integration Platform as a Service
feed.summary: SAP has been recognized as a Leader for the sixth consecutive time in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS). This acknowledgment is attributed to SAP's continuous investment in a modern, scalable, and AI-ready integration platform, SAP Integration Suite, which caters to complex hybrid and multicloud environments. The suite, part of SAP Business Technology Platform, offers API management, event-driven architecture, process integration, and AI-assisted development, enabling customers to connect systems, orchestrate workflows, and comply with regulations globally.

feed.title: DYLG Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:DYLG
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the Global X Dow 30 Covered Call & Growth ETF (DYLG), traded on the NYSE American. It includes key financial metrics like Assets Under Management (AUM), dividend yield, and expense ratio, along with details about its passive management style and the Cboe DJIA Half BuyWrite Index it tracks. The fund aims to offer growth potential and yield from the Dow Jones Industrial Average by using a covered call strategy on half of its portfolio.

feed.title: Regency Centers stock hits 52-week low at 21.39 USD
feed.summary: Regency Centers Corp Preferred Series B (REGCO) stock reached a 52-week low of $21.39, marking a 6.32% decline over the past year. Despite this, the preferred shares offer a 6.77% dividend yield, and the parent company has consistently paid dividends for 33 years. InvestingPro suggests the stock is currently undervalued, offering potential for income-focused investors.

feed.title: Five Below delivers strongest holiday performance since going public
feed.summary: Five Below achieved its strongest holiday performance since going public, with Q4 net sales increasing by 24.3% to $1.73 billion and comparable sales up 15.4%. The company's strategy, which includes expanded pricing up to $15 and beyond, is driving success despite a challenging macroeconomic environment. Five Below anticipates continued growth for fiscal year 2026, expecting net sales between $5.2 billion and $5.3 billion and approximately 150 new store openings.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Eos Energy
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE) and its officers. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of investors who purchased Eos Energy securities between November 5, 2025, and February 26, 2026, alleges that the company made materially false and misleading statements and failed to disclose critical operational issues. Investors are urged to join the case by May 5, 2026, to recover damages for alleged violations of federal securities laws.

feed.title: AC Immune (ACIU) CEO discloses equity and option holdings
feed.summary: AC Immune SA's CEO, Andrea Pfeifer, has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership, revealing her holdings in the company. She directly owns 3,840,288 Common Shares, which includes 1,921,005 Common Shares from restricted share units, and indirectly holds 14,000 Common Shares via her spouse. The filing also details fully vested share options with exercise prices between $2.03 and $9.53, expiring from 2027 to 2032.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share worth $531
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), purchased one share for $531.96 on March 18, 2026, increasing its direct ownership. This comes as TPL trades near its 52-week high, despite recent Q4 2025 earnings missing forecasts. KeyBanc recently raised its price target for TPL shares to $639, maintaining an Overweight rating due to developments in power generation and data center opportunities.

feed.title: Best-In-Class Claims Grow For Kelun/Merck’s Sac-TMT In Lung Cancer
feed.summary: New data regarding Kelun/Merck's Sac-TMT in lung cancer will be presented at the upcoming European Lung Cancer Congress in Copenhagen. This presentation follows Kelun's recent world-first TROP2 ADC approval in lung cancer. The article highlights growing "best-in-class" claims for the drug.

feed.title: Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz Encourages Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders To Inquire About Securities Fraud Class Action
authors: Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (IT) on behalf of shareholders who purchased stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements and failed to disclose issues regarding its contract value growth rate, leading to significant stock price drops on August 5, 2025, and February 3, 2026. Shareholders have until May 18, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: American Express sues singer Ray J for owing more than $78,000 in credit card debt
feed.summary: American Express has filed a lawsuit against singer Ray J, alleging he owes over $78,000 in unpaid credit card debt. This legal action comes amidst other challenges for Ray J, including a previous lawsuit from American Express, criminal charges for allegedly pulling a gun on his estranged wife, and a defamation suit from Kim and Kris Kardashian.
